notes: Apex store rotates regularly. Specific items in shop on 21 April 2026 not captured (requires live scrape). Golden Week event rotation expected ~28 April 2026 per leaker HYPERMYST.

apex_coins_purchase_tiers.note: Pricing consistent across Steam, PlayStation, and Xbox. Larger bundles include bonus coins.
apex_coins_purchase_tiers.best_value: 11,500 coin bundle at 115 coins/$, 15% more value vs 1000-coin bundles

limited_time_section.description: Two legendary skins (otherwise craftable) at 1,800 AC each, plus a recolor for each
limited_time_section.recolor_pricing: 10,500 AC without base skin, 1,800 AC with base skin owned

bundle_pricing.note: Bundle contents and pricing vary by event

upcoming_events.name: Golden Week 2026
upcoming_events.note: Historical Golden Week sales featured returning legendary skins

economy_notes: Triple currency system: Apex Coins (paid), Crafting Metals (earnable), Legend Tokens (earnable)
Apex Coins are the primary paid currency - required for direct shop purchases
Crafting Metals provide F2P path to specific cosmetics at lower tiers
Legend Tokens used for legend unlocks and recolour purchases (if base owned)
Apex Packs (loot boxes) available for 100 AC each - gacha element within cosmetic system
Collection Events require completing full set to unlock Heirloom/Mythic items
Store features both direct purchase and limited-time rotating items
Global price adjustment occurred May 2023 affecting some regional pricing
